title: Secondary workflow path
implementation_summary: Adds the RP00.P02.M03.S08 Hermes Validation Secondary workflow path surface as deterministic metadata-only control-plane policy, service prechecker, validator, fixture, README, contract definition, and contract validator wiring. The slice consumes S07 allow_metadata_only Primary happy path results, requires a carried happy_path_receipt and audit_event_ref, emits a frozen metadata-only secondary workflow receipt for Matter-scoped or firm-level control-plane metadata, carries S02, S03, S04, S05, S06, S07, M00 refs, TEN-001 through TEN-008 trace refs, validation context IDs, and acceptance gate IDs, rejects unsafe secondary-workflow, runtime, AuthZ, Hermes execution/evidence, audit write, tenant lifecycle mutation, requirement trace bypass, real-data, product-write, and review-bypass claims fail-closed, and hands off to RP00.P02.M03.S09 without appending audit ledgers, writing audit events, creating runtime routes, executing service logic, mutating tenant lifecycle state, running Hermes validation, creating Hermes evidence, evaluating runtime permissions, calling AuthZ, running a permission engine, replacing human approval, using real data, or writing product state.
